name: Talked to insurance guy after work fall, did I mess up?

mainEntity.name: Talked to insurance guy after work fall, did I mess up?

acceptedAnswer.description: **Possibly, as adjusters seek statements to deny; stop talking without a lawyer.** Recorded info can harm Utah/Idaho claims.[1] Key factors: (1) They twist words; (2) Right to attorney silence; (3) Review what said. Get counsel to counter. Don't sign releases.
